command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
sys.path.insert(0, 'runtime')
from agent_identity_loader import load_agent, _parse_environment

results = []

# A1-A5: core agents load with correct environment_awareness
expected = {
    'sakura':   ('presence_relationship_runtime', False, ['vm-hermes']),
    'remy':     ('engineering_runtime',           False, ['vm-openclaw','vm-mcp-services','vm-claude-hub']),
    'megabyte': ('infrastructure_heavy',          False, ['*']),
    'larry':    ('commerce_business',             False, []),
    'sentinel': ('system_wide',                   True,  ['*']),
}
for name, (scope, sent, vms) in expected.items():
    identity = load_agent(name)
    env = identity.get('environment_awareness')
    if env is None:
        results.append(f'FAIL A-{name}: environment_awareness absent'); continue
    if env.get('_default'):
        results.append(f'FAIL A-{name}: _default=True'); continue
    if env['scope_tier'] != scope:
        results.append(f'FAIL A-{name}: scope={env[\"scope_tier\"]} expected {scope}'); continue
    if env['sentinel_type'] != sent:
        results.append(f'FAIL A-{name}: sentinel_type={env[\"sentinel_type\"]} expected {sent}'); continue
    if env['vms_watched'] != vms:
        results.append(f'FAIL A-{name}: vms_watched={env[\"vms_watched\"]}'); continue
    results.append(f'PASS A-{name}: scope={scope} sentinel={sent}')

# A6: agent without ENVIRONMENT.md gets _default=True
test6 = _parse_environment('')
results.append('PASS A6: empty text -> _default=True' if test6.get('_default') else 'FAIL A6')

# A7: malformed JSON gets _default=True
test7 = _parse_environment('<!-- ENV_CONFIG: {bad stuff} -->')
results.append('PASS A7: bad JSON -> _default=True' if test7.get('_default') else 'FAIL A7')

# A8: all 4 personality agents pass validation (Sentinel has pre-existing SOUL issues)
for name in ['sakura','remy','megabyte','larry']:
    identity = load_agent(name)
    val = identity['validation']
    if not val['passed']:
        results.append(f'FAIL A8-{name}: validation failed: {val[\"errors\"]}')
    else:
        results.append(f'PASS A8-{name}: validation passed, warnings={len(val[\"warnings\"])}')

# A-extra: confirm no _default on any of the 5 core agents
for name in ['sakura','remy','megabyte','larry','sentinel']:
    identity = load_agent(name)
    env = identity.get('environment_awareness', {})
    if env.get('_default'):
        results.append(f'FAIL A-default-{name}: _default still set')

print()
for r in results: print(r)
passed = sum(1 for r in results if r.startswith('PASS'))
failed = sum(1 for r in results if r.startswith('FAIL'))
print(f'\nGROUP A: {passed} passed, {failed} failed')
print('IDENTITY GATE: PASSED' if failed == 0 else 'IDENTITY GATE: FAILED')
"
